default_strike.text:
Unique mage with 3 life. 0 strength, 0 bleed.
Talaq may strike for 1R damage. Talaq may play cards that require basic Quietus [qui] or basic Blood Sorcery [tha] as a vampire with a capacity of 3. Talaq gets an optional maneuver each combat.
